fields.summary: Login fails when password contains special characters
fields.description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. Go to login page
2. Enter valid email
3. Enter password with $, @, or ! characters
4. Click Login

Expected: User logs in successfully
Actual: 500 Internal Server Error

Stack trace from logs:
ValueError: Invalid character in password field at validators.py:23

Affects: 15% of users who have special characters in passwords
